mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( ISBN, review_title, review_content, view_cnt, secret, status, temporary, created_at, user_id, code_id ) VALUES ( #{req.isbn}, #{req.reviewTitle}, #{req.reviewContent}, 0, #{req.secret}, TRUE, #{req.temporary}, NOW(), #{userId}, #{req.codeId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET review_title = #{req.reviewTitle}, review_content = #{req.reviewContent}, secret = #{req.secret}, temporary = #{req.temporary}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.code_id AS codeId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id AND l.user_id = #{userId})) AS liked FROM reviews r WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId} AND (r.secret = FALSE OR r.user_id = #{userId})

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.code_id AS codeId FROM reviews r WHERE r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND ( r.secret = FALSE OR (#{userId} IS NOT NULL AND r.user_id = #{userId}) ) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.code_id AS codeId FROM reviews r WHERE r.status = TRUE AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.temporary = TRUE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.code_id AS codeId FROM reviews r WHERE r.review_id = #{id} AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.temporary = TRUE
